.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Update the Apache License URL from HTTP to HTTPS for security compliance.
Reorder import statements to follow standard Java conventions (java.io before java.net).
Reformat string concatenation for DEFAULT_DOWNLOAD_URL to improve readability.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: private static final String DEFAULT_DOWNLOAD_URL = "..." + WRAPPER_VERSION + "/...";

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Reformat constant assignments for MAVEN_WRAPPER_PROPERTIES_PATH and MAVEN_WRAPPER_JAR_PATH to single lines.
Add space after 'if' keyword to comply with standard code style.
Add space after 'if' keyword in nested conditionals to comply with standard code style.
Add space after 'if' keyword in directory existence check to comply with standard code style.
Reformat error message string concatenation for better readability.
Reformat anonymous Authenticator class instantiation for better indentation and readability.
Remove trailing empty line at the end of the file.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Removed empty line after closing brace.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Migrate the import statement from the legacy javax.annotation package to the Jakarta EE namespace.
Update the version string in the generated annotation comment to reflect the current generator version.
Replace javax.annotation.PostConstruct with jakarta.annotation.PostConstruct to align with Jakarta EE namespace requirements in newer Spring Boot versions.
Convert multi-line string concatenation in log statement to Java 15+ text blocks for improved readability.
Add CRLFLogConverter marker to log statement to ensure safe logging of multi-line strings.
Update active profiles logging to show default profiles when no active profiles are explicitly set.
Replace escaped single quotes with literal single quotes in log message string to fix syntax or formatting.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed "'{}'" to "'{}'" (removing backslash escapes) in the error log string.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Restrict the AsyncConfiguration bean to non-test profiles to prevent conflicts with test-specific configurations.
Replace javax.annotation imports with jakarta.annotation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
Update Hazelcast configuration API usage from put-based map config registration to the newer addMapConfig method.
Pass map names directly to the MapConfig constructor instead of relying on implicit naming or subsequent registration.
Update single-element annotation attribute to use explicit array syntax for consistency or linter compliance.
Replace the legacy javax-based Hibernate5Module with the Jakarta-namespaced Hibernate5JakartaModule to support the Jakarta EE namespace required by newer Spring Boot versions.
Remove the Zalando Problem Jackson modules as they are no longer needed or have been replaced by standard Spring Boot problem handling.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed imports for ProblemModule and ConstraintViolationProblemModule and their corresponding @Bean methods.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Boot Liquibase setter with the new API method to maintain compatibility with updated Spring Boot version.
Refactor Spring Security configuration from the deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter to the modern SecurityFilterChain bean approach required by Spring Security 5.7+/6.x.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: public class SecurityConfiguration { @Bean public SecurityFilterChain filterChain(HttpSecurity http) ... }

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace the deprecated @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity annotation with the new @EnableMethodSecurity annotation compatible with newer Spring Security versions.
Replace the deprecated authorizeRequests() and antMatchers() methods with the new authorizeHttpRequests() and requestMatchers() methods.
Migrate header configuration from the old fluent API to the new lambda-based DSL for headers, including renaming featurePolicy to permissionsPolicy.
Migrate CSRF configuration to the new lambda-based DSL and update token repository handling.
Replace custom problem support exception handlers with standard HttpStatusEntryPoint and update the configuration style to lambda-based DSL.
Replace custom Ajax authentication/logout handlers with standard Spring Security handlers returning HTTP status codes.
Remove the inheritance from WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter and the associated configure(WebSecurity) method, moving ignored paths to the filter chain or removing them if no longer needed.
Add a new SpaWebFilter to handle Single Page Application specific security requirements, replacing or supplementing previous CORS/CSRF handling.
Add a CookieCsrfFilter to handle CSRF tokens via cookies, aligning with modern SPA security practices.
Update Content Security Policy to be configurable via JHipsterProperties and adjust frame options to sameOrigin.
Update the permissions policy string to match the new syntax and requirements.
Add security rules for OpenAPI/Swagger documentation endpoints.
Simplify the constructor by removing dependencies on CorsFilter and SecurityProblemSupport which are no longer used.
Remove the bean definitions for custom AjaxAuthenticationSuccessHandler, AjaxAuthenticationFailureHandler, and AjaxLogoutSuccessHandler.
Update imports to reflect the new Spring Security classes and remove deprecated ones.
Consolidate static resource locations by removing the specific app subdirectory in favor of the root static directory.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed RESOURCE_LOCATIONS from including 'classpath:/static/app/' to just 'classpath:/static/'

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update resource path patterns to explicitly match file extensions and adjust path wildcards for better static resource resolution.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Replaced RESOURCE_PATHS array with specific extensions like '/*.js', '/*.css' and adjusted wildcards for content and i18n
